_comment: Copy this file to config.json and edit. GITHUB_TOKEN must be set in the environment (never put the token in this file).
_comment_window: The recency window. 'updated_since_days' feeds the API 'since' param (filters on updated_at). 'closed_within_days' is a client-side filter on closed_at. ALL raw timestamps are stored regardless, so you can widen these later WITHOUT re-crawling. Set either to null to disable that bound.
_comment_targeting: The /issues endpoint returns pull requests too (GitHub models PRs as issues). Target is issues, so PRs are skipped by default. Set include_pull_requests=true to store them raw as well.
_comment_rate: Rate-limit + retry tuning. rate_limit_buffer: pause when remaining requests drop to/below this. request_delay_seconds: polite delay between requests (0 is fine when authenticated).
